team.name_cn: CPS人工智能与优化课题组
team.name_en: AI and Optimization for Cyber-Physical Systems Research Group

selected_publications.title: A Data-Driven Multi-objective Differential Evolution Framework for Charging-Thermal Coupled Parameter Optimization in Rotary Hearth Furnace Operations
selected_publications.authors: Luo Q, Jiang S L*, Chiong R, Lv X
selected_publications.summary: 面向转底炉充放电热耦合参数优化问题，构建数据驱动的多目标差分进化框架，提升复杂工艺条件下的参数寻优能力。

selected_publications.title: An online learning-based mACO approach for hot rolling scheduling problems involving dynamic order arrivals
selected_publications.venue: IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering
selected_publications.authors: Jiang S L, Cao L, Liu Q*, et al.
selected_publications.summary: 针对动态订单到达下的热轧调度问题，构建融合在线学习的多目标蚁群优化方法，以提升变化环境中的求解质量与响应能力。

selected_publications.title: A learning-guided MOEA for energy-oriented hybrid flow shop scheduling with limited buffers
selected_publications.authors: He L, Jiang S L*, Sun L, Chiong R
selected_publications.summary: 面向能耗导向且带有限缓冲区的混合流水车间调度问题，提出学习引导的多目标进化算法，兼顾延迟与非加工能耗优化。

selected_publications.title: A learning-enhanced ant colony optimization algorithm for integrated planning and scheduling in hot rolling production lines under uncertainty
selected_publications.authors: Jiang S L*, He L, Cao L, et al.
selected_publications.summary: 将热轧计划与调度统一于机会约束框架下，通过学习增强的蚁群优化实现不确定条件下的一体化协同优化。

selected_publications.title: 基于分层强化学习的天车调度优化方法
selected_publications.authors: 苏章圣，蒋胜龙*，彭功状，梁越永
selected_publications.summary: 面向炼钢流程中的天车调度问题，采用分层强化学习框架提升复杂约束下的决策效率与调度效果。

selected_publications.title: Plant-wide byproduct gas distribution under uncertainty in iron and steel industry via quantile forecasting and robust optimization
selected_publications.authors: Jiang S L*, Wang M, Bogle I D L
selected_publications.summary: 融合分位数预测与鲁棒优化，实现钢铁流程副产煤气在不确定环境下的全厂协同分配，体现能源系统优化方向成果。
